# CWE-603 negative: billing mutation requires session uid match (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-603-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func UpdateBillingPlan(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	uid := r.Header.Get("X-UID")
	if uid == "" {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if uid != r.PathValue("id") {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE billing SET plan = ? WHERE user_id = ?", r.FormValue("plan"), uid)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
